title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a man giving information to people who are helping at a music festival.
audio_script: Man: Thank you for coming to this meeting for music festival helpers. The festival is next weekend, and we need everyone to understand their jobs. Most of you will work at the information desk, but a few people will help near the stage. The person in charge of helpers is Maria [14]Stone[/14]. If you have a problem during the day, please find her before you phone anyone else. Helpers should arrive at the park by [15]eight forty-five[/15] on Saturday morning. The gates open to the public an hour later. Please wear black trousers and comfortable shoes. We will give you a yellow [16]jacket[/16] so visitors can recognise you easily. Your main job is to answer simple questions about times, toilets, and lost property. Lost property will be kept in the [17]tent[/17] next to the first-aid area. You can have lunch for free, but you must collect a ticket from the staff office. The hot meal on Saturday is [18]curry[/18], and there is also a vegetarian choice. At the end of the day, helpers should meet by the main stage at [19]six thirty[/19] so we can check that everything has been returned. The festival can be busy, especially just before the first band starts, so try to stay calm if several visitors ask questions at the same time. You are not expected to know everything. If you are unsure, send the visitor to the information desk. Please check the notice board before you leave, because small changes to rooms or times may be written there. If you are not sure about anything, ask a member of staff.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the person in charge is Maria Stone.
The speaker says helpers should arrive by eight forty-five.
The speaker says helpers will receive a yellow jacket.
